news.title: MPS Expands Automotive Power Management Portfolio with New AEC-Q100 Qualified Products
news.titleCn: MPS扩展汽车电源管理产品线，推出全新AEC-Q100认证产品
news.summary: MPS announces expansion of automotive-grade power management ICs with new AEC-Q100 qualified DC-DC converters and motor drivers for ADAS and body electronics applications.
news.content: Kirkland, WA - Monolithic Power Systems (MPS) today announced the expansion of its automotive power management portfolio with new AEC-Q100 qualified products. The new releases include high-current DC-DC converters, integrated motor drivers, and LED lighting controllers designed for next-generation automotive applications. The automotive-grade products undergo rigorous qualification testing including temperature cycling, EMC validation, and reliability verification. All products are manufactured in IATF 16949 certified facilities with full traceability. Key new products include the MPQ8862-AEC1 12A synchronous buck converter with cold crank capability, MPQ6541-AEC1 3-phase BLDC motor driver, and MPQ44010-AEC1 LED controller. These products support the industry's transition to electrification and advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS).

news.title: MPS Introduces 48V Direct Conversion Solution for Data Center Applications
news.titleCn: MPS推出面向数据中心应用的48V直接转换解决方案
news.summary: New 48V-to-point-of-load converters enable next-generation data center power architecture with improved efficiency and reduced distribution losses.
news.content: Kirkland, WA - MPS has introduced a new family of 48V direct conversion power solutions designed for hyperscale data centers and cloud computing infrastructure. The new products eliminate the traditional 12V intermediate bus, improving overall system efficiency by 3-5% and reducing power distribution losses. The portfolio includes the MPM3695 25A power module and MPQ8862 48V-capable buck converters. These products support the Open Compute Project (OCP) and Open Rack standards being adopted by major cloud providers. The 48V architecture reduces copper busbar requirements and enables higher power density. MPS also provides reference designs and evaluation platforms to accelerate customer development.

news.title: MPS Launches Digital Power Platform with PMBus Interface
news.titleCn: MPS推出带PMBus接口的数字电源平台
news.summary: New digital power management ICs with PMBus interface enable intelligent monitoring and control for enterprise and data center applications.
news.content: Kirkland, WA - MPS has launched its new digital power platform featuring PMBus interface for intelligent power management. The platform includes digital DC-DC converters with real-time monitoring, adaptive voltage scaling, and predictive maintenance capabilities. Products include the MPM54304 quad-output power module with I2C/PMBus interface and MPQ8862D digital buck converter. The PMBus interface enables data center operators to monitor power consumption, temperature, and health status in real-time. This supports predictive maintenance and optimization of power usage effectiveness (PUE). The digital platform is supported by MPS's Virtual Bench GUI software for easy configuration and monitoring.

news.title: MPS Achieves ISO 26262 Functional Safety Certification for Automotive Products
news.titleCn: MPS汽车产品获得ISO 26262功能安全认证
news.summary: MPS receives ISO 26262 functional safety certification, enabling support for ASIL-rated automotive applications including ADAS and autonomous driving.
news.content: Kirkland, WA - Monolithic Power Systems announced that it has achieved ISO 26262 functional safety certification for its automotive power management product development process. This certification enables MPS to support customers developing safety-critical automotive applications up to ASIL-D level. The certification covers the development process, documentation, and safety analysis required for functional safety compliance. MPS has also released its first ISO 26262-compliant products including safety mechanisms, diagnostic coverage documentation, and FMEDA analysis. These products support ADAS, domain controllers, and autonomous driving applications where functional safety is critical. The certification demonstrates MPS's commitment to supporting the automotive industry's safety requirements.

news.title: MPS Commits to Carbon Neutrality by 2030
news.summary: MPS announces comprehensive sustainability initiative including carbon neutrality commitment and expansion of energy-efficient product portfolio.
news.content: Kirkland, WA - MPS has announced a comprehensive sustainability initiative with a commitment to achieve carbon neutrality in its operations by 2030. The initiative includes transitioning to renewable energy sources, improving manufacturing efficiency, and offsetting remaining emissions through verified carbon credits. MPS is also expanding its portfolio of energy-efficient power management products that help customers reduce their carbon footprint. The company's high-efficiency DC-DC converters enable significant energy savings in data centers, electric vehicles, and renewable energy systems. MPS estimates that its products deployed in the field help avoid millions of tons of CO2 emissions annually through improved energy efficiency.
